taskId: 20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级
message: 已完成架构设计并写入： - `.ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/design.md` 产出内容覆盖： - Project Registry 存储位置与 schema - Project Space main/worktree schema - session `projectId/spaceId` 写入与旧 session 兼容 - session index 缓存设计 - WorkTree 配置/API 兼容与映射策略 - API / lib 模块边界 - 左侧导航、新建 session、打开旧 session 数据流 - 分阶段 Implementation Plan（含 `json ypi-implementation-plan`） - 验证清单、风险与回滚/缓解 - UI 设计员补充建议 验证： - 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc`，本次仅修改规划文档。 - 已读取写入后的 `design.md` 开头确认落盘成功。 剩余风险 / 需主会话决策： 1. legacy exact-cwd 旧会话是否默认折叠显示在 space 下，还是仅允许 URL 打开。 2. Project/space 删除是否第一版只 archive。 3. WorkTree 删除/归档是否继续沿用当前“删除相关 sessions”行为。 4. 是否允许未来手动把旧 session 关联到当前 space；本设计暂不做自动/批量迁移。

taskId: 20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级
message:
已完成架构设计并写入：

- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/design.md`

产出内容覆盖：

- Project Registry 存储位置与 schema
- Project Space main/worktree schema
- session `projectId/spaceId` 写入与旧 session 兼容
- session index 缓存设计
- WorkTree 配置/API 兼容与映射策略
- API / lib 模块边界
- 左侧导航、新建 session、打开旧 session 数据流
- 分阶段 Implementation Plan（含 `json ypi-implementation-plan`）
- 验证清单、风险与回滚/缓解
- UI 设计员补充建议

验证：

- 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc`，本次仅修改规划文档。
- 已读取写入后的 `design.md` 开头确认落盘成功。

剩余风险 / 需主会话决策：

1. legacy exact-cwd 旧会话是否默认折叠显示在 space 下，还是仅允许 URL 打开。
2. Project/space 删除是否第一版只 archive。
3. WorkTree 删除/归档是否继续沿用当前“删除相关 sessions”行为。
4. 是否允许未来手动把旧 session 关联到当前 space；本设计暂不做自动/批量迁移。

message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/project-registry-types.ts` — added Project Registry/project-space schema and input types.
- `lib/project-registry.ts` — added registry persistence, canonical realpath path keys, project registration, main-space creation, duplicate detection, and metadata patch helpers.
- `app/api/projects/**/route.ts` — added project and project-space GET/POST/PATCH APIs.
- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented new Project Registry API routes.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented new registry lib modules.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — produced required handoff artifact.

#### Verification

- `npm install --include=dev` — installed missing dev dependencies; npm reported existing peer/vulnerability warnings.
- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Limited to selected `registry-lib-api` subtask only.
- Session link, WorkTree sync, allowed roots, sidebar UI, and legacy UX remain for later subtasks.
- No decisions needed from main session.

transcript.taskId: 20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级

taskId: 20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级
message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed / Artifacts

- `lib/project-registry.ts` — added WorkTree space sync/upsert/archive helpers.
- `lib/git-worktree.ts` — exported `WorktreeRecord`.
- `lib/allowed-roots.ts` — includes active Project Registry roots/spaces for file API access without sessions.
- `app/api/projects/route.ts` — refreshes WorkTree spaces after project registration.
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/worktrees/refresh/route.ts` — new refresh API.
- `app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts` — WorkTree create/remove now syncs registry spaces.
- `app/api/git/worktrees/archive/route.ts` — archive removal marks registry spaces archived/missing.
- `docs/modules/api.md` / `docs/modules/library.md` — documented changes.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/handoff.md` — appended handoff section.

#### Validation

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual browser/API verification run.
- WorkTree removal/archive still deletes related sessions per existing behavior; registry space is additionally marked `archived=true` and `missing=true`.
- Decisions needed from main session: None.

taskId: 20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级
message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-project-link.ts` — added session header link helpers and legacy-unassigned detection.
- `lib/project-session-index.ts` — added best-effort `pi-web-session-index.json` maintenance.
- `lib/types.ts` — added optional `projectId`, `spaceId`, `legacyUnassigned`.
- `lib/session-reader.ts` — returns project link metadata for active/archived sessions.
- `lib/agent-session-bootstrap.ts` — validates project/space context, writes linked headers/index.
- `app/api/agent/new/route.ts` — accepts/forwards `projectId` + `spaceId`.
- `app/api/agent/draft/route.ts` — accepts/forwards `projectId` + `spaceId`.
- `lib/rpc-manager.ts` — linked forks inherit project/space; legacy forks remain unassigned.
- `app/api/sessions/[id]/route.ts` — includes link metadata while tolerating old sessions.
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/[spaceId]/sessions/route.ts` — added space sessions API with optional legacy exact-cwd results.
- Docs updated: `docs/architecture/overview.md`, `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/library.md`.
- Artifact updated: `.ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/handoff.md`.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.
- `git diff --check` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual browser/API verification was run.
- Session index is maintained for new/forked linked sessions, but project-space session API still filters headers as source of truth.

message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — Project Registry-driven Project → Space sidebar, lazy project-space session loading, add project path flow, legacy unassigned session section, project/space context forwarding. - `components/AppShell.tsx` — tracks active/new project-space context and passes it into chat creation. - `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — accepts new-session project-space context. - `hooks/useAgentSession.ts` — sends optional `projectId`/`spaceId` to new/draft session APIs. - `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented new frontend data flow. - `.ypi/.../handoff.md` — appended sidebar-project-tree handoff notes. #### Verification - `npm run lint` — passed. - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed. #### Notes / Risks - No manual browser/API verification run. - WorkTree creation refreshes registry data and relies on path matching after refresh; checker should verify newly created WorkTree space selection/linking in UI.

taskId: 20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级
message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — Project Registry-driven Project → Space sidebar, lazy project-space session loading, add project path flow, legacy unassigned session section, project/space context forwarding.
- `components/AppShell.tsx` — tracks active/new project-space context and passes it into chat creation.
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — accepts new-session project-space context.
- `hooks/useAgentSession.ts` — sends optional `projectId`/`spaceId` to new/draft session APIs.
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented new frontend data flow.
- `.ypi/.../handoff.md` — appended sidebar-project-tree handoff notes.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual browser/API verification run.
- WorkTree creation refreshes registry data and relies on path matching after refresh; checker should verify newly created WorkTree space selection/linking in UI.

message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — added project/space metadata edit modal for display name, tags, pinned, archived; added workspace menu actions; pinned/archived now update sidebar sorting/visibility; missing spaces remain metadata-editable while new session stays disabled; legacy sessions show inline “未关联”.
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented sidebar metadata editing.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/handoff.md` — appended subtask handoff.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual browser verification run.
- Archived projects/spaces are hidden from active selector; no separate archived-project management view added in this subtask.

message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed / Artifacts

- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — added Project Registry boundary, storage, canonical path, session-link source-of-truth notes.
- `docs/modules/api.md` — verified/kept Project Registry and project-space API documentation.
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — verified registry-driven sidebar/project-space context documentation.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — verified registry/session-link/index/canonical path reuse guidance.
- `AGENTS.md` — added Project Registry navigation, invariants, and data-file locations.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/handoff.md` — appended docs-validation handoff.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Browser/API manual checklist from `checks.md` was not executed in this non-interactive delegated pass; checker/main session should run it against a dev server.
- No decisions needed from main session.
